goals: Refactor all five inference tools to return a job ID within 200ms instead of blocking until completion.
Add `get_job_status` tool for single-shot status checks.
Add `wait_for_job` tool that polls internally and resolves only when the job reaches a terminal state (with a configurable timeout).
Remove the subprocess-spawning pattern from `parallax_mcp` â€” all execution goes through the shared job layer.

userStories.title: Non-blocking inference tools
userStories.description: As an AI agent using the MCP server, I want `create_image`, `create_video`, `create_audio`, `edit_image`, and `upscale_image` to return a job ID immediately so that I can avoid tool timeouts on long-running operations and continue with other reasoning while inference runs.

acceptanceCriteria.text: All five tools call `submitJob()` from `@parallax/sdk/submit` instead of spawning `parallax_cli` as a subprocess.
Each tool returns within 200ms with a text response of the form: `job_id: <id>\nstatus: queued\nmodel: <model>`.
The tool descriptions in `registerTool` are updated to mention that they return a job ID, not the output path directly.
The `Bun.spawn` subprocess pattern is fully removed from `parallax_mcp/src/index.ts`.
`bun typecheck` passes on `parallax_mcp`.
Manually verified: calling `create_video` via Claude returns a job ID in under 1 second.

userStories.title: get_job_status tool
userStories.description: As an AI agent, I want to call `get_job_status` with a job ID and receive the current state, progress percentage, and output path (when done) so that I can check whether inference has finished before taking further actions.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `get_job_status` is registered with input schema `{ job_id: z.string() }`.
Returns a JSON-formatted text response with fields: `id`, `status`, `progress`, `output` (null or string), `error` (null or string), `model`, `action`, `media`.
When `job_id` does not exist, returns `isError: true` with message `Job <id> not found`.
`bun typecheck` passes.

userStories.title: wait_for_job tool
userStories.description: As an AI agent, I want to call `wait_for_job` with a job ID and optional timeout so that I can block until inference finishes and get the output path in one tool call â€” useful when the agent wants a synchronous-style result but without causing MCP transport timeouts.

acceptanceCriteria.text: `wait_for_job` is registered with input schema `{ job_id: z.string(), timeout_seconds: z.number().optional().default(600) }`.
Polls `getQueue().getJob(id)` every 2 seconds until the job reaches `completed` or `failed`, or the timeout is exceeded.
On `completed`: returns `{ status: "completed", output: "<path>", duration_seconds: N }`.
On `failed`: returns `isError: true` with `{ status: "failed", error: "<reason>" }`.
On timeout: returns `isError: true` with `{ status: "timeout", job_id: "<id>", message: "Job did not complete within <N> seconds. Use get_job_status to check later." }`.
Closes the queue connection before returning.
`bun typecheck` passes.

userStories.title: Update tool descriptions for agent discoverability
userStories.description: As an AI agent discovering MCP tools, I want the tool descriptions to reflect the async pattern so that I know to call `get_job_status` or `wait_for_job` after submitting a job.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Each inference tool description ends with: `Returns a job_id. Use get_job_status to poll or wait_for_job to block until done.`
`get_job_status` description reads: `Check the current status and progress of a submitted inference job. Returns status, progress percentage (0-100), and output path when completed.`
`wait_for_job` description reads: `Block until a submitted inference job completes. Polls internally every 2 seconds. Default timeout: 600 seconds. Returns output path on success.`
`bun typecheck` passes.

functionalRequirements.description: `@parallax/sdk` must be added as a `workspace:*` dependency in `parallax_mcp/package.json`.
`getQueue().close()` must be called after every tool handler that calls `getQueue()` â€” do not leave SQLite handles open across tool calls.
The `CLI_DIR` constant and all `Bun.spawn(["bun", "run", "src/index.ts", ...args])` calls must be removed.

All model validation (does the model exist for the given action/media?) must use `validateModel()` from `@parallax/cli/models/registry` or equivalent â€” do not silently submit jobs with invalid models.
Script path resolution for `ParallaxJobData.script` must use `getScript()` from the model registry â€” same logic as the CLI.
